etymology.description: Phonetic 𡍬 + Semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry") -> original form 𧸇 -> 𡍬 reduced to 士(士) (shì, "scholar") and 四(四) (sì, "four") -> current form 𧶠
etymology.interpretation: The character 𧶠 originally used 𡍬 for its phonetic component and 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry") to signify association with trade or currency, typical of its meaning related to selling and trading. The graphic reduction of 𡍬 to 士(士) and 四(四) over time reflects the character's evolution in form but not in function.
